ddls:
CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product */,
  "brand" TEXT /* Brand name of the product */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the product */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the product image */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the product was added to the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the product was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "packages" (
  "package_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each package */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product the package belongs to */,
  "pill_count" INTEGER /* Number of pills in the package */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the package */,
  "discount" REAL /* Discount amount for the package */,
  "price_per_pill" REAL /* Price per pill for the package */,
  "savings" REAL /* Savings amount for the package */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the package was added to the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the package was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("package_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_packages_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "package_id" INTEGER /* ID of the package being ordered */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer placing the order */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date the order was placed */,
  "total_cost" REAL /* Total cost of the order */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the order */,
  "shipping_address" TEXT /* Shipping address for the order */,
  "billing_address" TEXT /* Billing address for the order */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the order was placed */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the order was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_package_id FOREIGN KEY ("package_id") REFERENCES packages ("package_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the customer's account */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the customer */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the customer account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the customer account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payments" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order being paid for */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment (e.g., credit card, PayPal) */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date the payment was made */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of the payment */,
  "transaction_id" TEXT /* Transaction ID from the payment gateway */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the payment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the payment was made */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the payment status was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payments_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "package_id" INTEGER /* ID of the package */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Current quantity of the package in stock */,
  "reorder_level" INTEGER /* Reorder level for the package */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the inventory record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the inventory record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("package_id")
)
